name: costmarshal
description: Codex-native cost-aware orchestration across low, medium, and high API providers.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate low, medium, and high APIs from Codex.
interface.longDescription: CostMarshal gives Codex a scheduler-first, recoverable way to coordinate low-, medium-, and high-cost API providers. It preserves safety floors, leader-owned acceptance, immutable pricing and profile evidence, budget reservations, and optional read-only ArchMarshal governance while keeping the local runtime engine behind a Codex-native Skill interface.
defaultPrompt: Use CostMarshal to complete this task with the best cost-quality tradeoff.
Route this work across low, medium, and high APIs with recoverable handoffs.
Audit this CostMarshal project and explain the safest economical route.
